content: Delightful agony awaits. Thresh joins 2XKO on June 9. Available on PC, Xbox Series X|S, and PlayStation 5. Play 2XKO for free: https://2xko.riotgames.com/en-us/ 2XKO is a free-to-play fighting game from Riot Games, the studio behind VALORANT and League of Legends. Fight solo or with a friend in explosive 2v2 showdowns, mastering a range of powerful champion abilities and unique tag mechanics to take down the enemy duo. #2XKO #RiotGames Find us on: Instagram: http://instagram.com/2XKO Facebook: http://facebook.com/play2XKO X: http://twitter.com/play2XKO TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@2xko Twitch: http://www.twitch.tv/2xko
chineseTitle: | T | h | r | e | s | h | | 游 | 戏 | 玩 | 法 | 预 | 告 | 片 | | | | | 2 | X | K | O |
chineseContent: 令人愉快的痛苦等待着。 Thresh 将于 6 月 9 日加入 2XKO。可在 PC、Xbox Series X|S 和 PlayStation 5 上购买。免费畅玩 2XKO：https://2xko.riotgames.com/en-us/ 2XKO 是一款来自 Riot Games（《VALORANT》和《英雄联盟》的工作室）的免费格斗游戏。单人战斗或与朋友一起进行爆炸性的 2v2 决战，掌握一系列强大的冠军能力和独特的标签机制来击败敌方二人组。 #2XKO #RiotGames 通过以下方式找到我们： Instagram：http://instagram.com/2XKO Facebook：http://facebook.com/play2XKO X：http://twitter.com/play2XKO TikTok：http://tiktok.com/@2xko Twitch：http://www.twitch.tv/2xko
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
